title: Revised Rules and Regulations Governing Overseas Employment of Landbased Workers
content: These rules and regulations govern the overseas employment of landbased workers under the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA). They set forth the policies, procedures, and standards to ensure the protection and welfare of Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs) deployed abroad.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
